mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_record ( user_id, record_time, blood_pressure, temperature, blood_sugar, heart_rate, weight, height, health_status, create_time, update_time, remark, white_blood_cell, hemoglobin, hematocrit, platelet_count, alt, ast, ggt, alp, total_protein, albumin, creatinine, blood_urea_nitrogen, egfr, uric_acid, total_cholesterol, triglycerides, ldl_cholesterol, hdl_cholesterol ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{recordTime}, #{bloodPressure}, #{temperature}, #{bloodSugar}, #{heartRate}, #{weight}, #{height}, #{healthStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{whiteBloodCell}, #{hemoglobin}, #{hematocrit}, #{plateletCount}, #{alt}, #{ast}, #{ggt}, #{alp}, #{totalProtein}, #{albumin}, #{creatinine}, #{bloodUreaNitrogen}, #{egfr}, #{uricAcid}, #{totalCholesterol}, #{triglycerides}, #{ldlCholesterol}, #{hdlCholesterol} )
